# csv_to_parquet { #geost.utils.csv_to_parquet }

```python
utils.csv_to_parquet(file, out_file=None, **kwargs)
```

Convert csv table to parquet.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type               | Description                                                                         | Default    |
|----------|--------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| file     | Union\[str, Path\] | Path to csv file to convert.                                                        | _required_ |
| out_file | Union\[str, Path\] | Path to parquet file to be written. If not provided it will use the path of 'file'. | `None`     |
| **kwargs |                    | pandas.read_csv kwargs. See pandas.read_csv documentation.                          | `{}`       |

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

| Name   | Type      | Description                 |
|--------|-----------|-----------------------------|
|        | TypeError | If 'file' is not a csv file |
